title: Mazchna
wikitext:
{{external|rs}} {{Has calculator|Calculator:Slayer/Slayer_task_weight}} {{Infobox NPC |name = Mazchna |image = [[File:Mazchna.png|135px]] |release = [[26 January]] [[2005]] |update = Slayer Skill |members = Yes |race = [[Demon]] |location = [[Canifis]] |shop = [[Slayer Equipment (shop)|Slayer Equipment]], [[Slayer Rewards]] |gender = Male |options = Talk-to, Assignment, Trade, Rewards |examine = He looks dangerous! |map = {{Map|name=Mazchna|x=3511|y=3509|r=3|mtype=square}} |id = 13620 |leagueRegion = Morytania }} [[File:Mazchna chathead.png|left|class=notpageimage]] '''Mazchna''' ({{IPAc-en|ˈ|m|æ|ʃ|n|ə}} {{respell|mash|ner}}) is the second-to-lowest level [[Slayer Master]], giving tasks to players with a [[Combat level]] of 20 and above. He is located in north-eastern [[Canifis]], and therefore completion of the [[Priest in Peril]] quest is required to access him. His tasks are relatively easy and ideal for players with lower combat levels. He has a unique sword and is wearing [[Dharok's platebody]] as well as a pair of [[Dharok's platelegs]]. During [[While Guthix Sleeps]], he is replaced by [[Achtryn]]. Blocking a task with this slayer master costs 50 [[Slayer reward point|Slayer reward points]]. ==Diaries== Getting a Slayer task from Mazchna is a task in the [[Morytania Easy Diary]]. ==Slayer points== Players can receive [[Slayer reward point]]s for completing [[Slayer task]]s—this is based on how many tasks players have accomplished in a row. Completion of a task assigned by Mazchna will grant you: {| class=wikitable style="text-align:center;" !Task interval !Points given |- |Every task |6 |- |Every 10th |30 |- |Every 50th |90 |- |Every 100th |150 |- |Every 250th |210 |- |Every 1,000th |300 |} Mazchna's blocks cost 50 Slayer points. ==Tasks== {{:Mazchna/Slayer assignments}} Note: Mazchna is a valid contact for the [[NPC Contact]] spell, and you can obtain tasks from them. It is part of the [[Lunar spellbook]]. ==Dialogue== {{Hastranscript|NPC}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 27 August 2025 |update = Summer Sweep Up Slayer & More |change = The amount of [[Slayer points]] given by Mazchna was increased: * Every task - 6 points (up from 2) * Every 10th task - 30 points (up from 5) * Every 50th task - 90 points (up from 15) }} {{Subject changes |date = 26 March 2025 |update = Poll 83 QoL Changes |poll = Poll 83 - Castle Wars, New Player Changes & More |change = Mazchna will now assign [[Slayer task/Crabs|crabs]] tasks. }} {{Subject changes |date = 10 July 2024 |update = While Guthix Sleeps |change = Mazchna was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes |date = 8 May 2024 |update = Project Rebalance: Skilling & Poll 81 MTA Changes |poll = |change = *Mazchna no longer assigns players Earth Warrior tasks. *Various minimum and maximum quantities of Slayer tasks have been reduced. }} {{Subject changes |date = 18 February 2016 |update = Dragon Claws & 3rd Birthday |poll = Quality of Life - Top 10 PvM Suggestions |change = Slayer masters now give information about your current task if you prematurely request a new one. }} {{Subject changes |date = 29 January 2015 |update = Ignore lists, 1v1s & More |poll = Old School Content Poll 29: Grand Exchange |change = Slayer masters now have a right-click option, Assignment, which allows players to quickly check a task's progress or start a new one. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Mazchna v1.png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Mazchna.png|center|300x150px]] | |- |[[File:Mazchna chathead v1.png|center]] |[[File:Mazchna chathead.png|center]] |- |26 January 2005 –
10 July 2024 |10 July 2024 –
present |} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Slayer Master}} {{Canifis}} {{Demons}} {{NPC Contact}} {{While Guthix Sleeps}}
